chunks.title: 12_Media Queries (Orientation)
chunks.text: And we will do this, a little resize, refresh Now what can we do to bring it to landscape mode? By default, this is landscape mode, but if I go to a phone, let's suppose iPhone 12 Pro Normally my screen will look something like this on my phone

chunks.text: Background color became aqua and my font color became brown equal Again I brought it in portrait, so it became normal, then it changed So whenever we use apps, we keep the phone in this way So my phone, apps are shown in different ways, but we keep the phone in this way

chunks.title: 12_Media Queries (Orientation)
chunks.text: So my phone, apps are shown in different ways, but we keep the phone in this way So the UI of the app changes for me, so how does it change? It can change with the help of media queries and responsiveness

full_text: Let's do another thing, this time we are going to define our media query on our orientation What is orientation? We just talked about one is my portrait and one is my landscape mode So I want to say that whenever my screen is landscape, then we change the background color of our div or h1 So here we can do orientation for add the rate Media Here we will write orientation, as the landscape becomes Similarly, the background color of h1 becomes aqua and we want the color of its font to be brown Safe And we will do this, a little resize, refresh Now what can we do to bring it to landscape mode? By default, this is landscape mode, but if I go to a phone, let's suppose iPhone 12 Pro Normally my screen will look something like this on my phone But from here I can tilt my phone, rotate it Rotate, so it came to landscape mode Background color became aqua and my font color became brown equal Again I brought it in portrait, so it became normal, then it changed So whenever we use apps, we keep the phone in this way So my phone, apps are shown in different ways, but we keep the phone in this way So the UI of the app changes for me, so how does it change? It can change with the help of media queries and responsiveness
